summary: Full testing of Hujjah Trivia SaaS features: auth (register/login), admin dashboard (3 tabs), pricing page, and homepage user bar. All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend flows working correctly.

issues: Stats tab background appears light beige/cream color while other tabs are dark burgundy - inconsistent color theme. May be intentional but feels off brand.

action_items: Consider making the Statistics tab background consistent with the dark burgundy theme of the rest of the admin dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe checkout correctly returns 503 when STRIPE_API_KEY is 'sk_test_emergent' (mocked). Users will see Arabic error message about payment service not being activated.
Admin route is /admin (login) -> redirects to /admin/dashboard after login. This works correctly.
Server.py is 1151 lines - approaching the 700 line limit, consider splitting into modules (auth.py, admin.py, game.py, subscriptions.py)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests (auto-cleanup not implemented but prefix TEST_ used in emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified: HomePage (user bar دخول/حساب جديد, 10 categories, العب الحين btn) -> Login (test@test.com/test123 works) -> post-login shows username + ترقية btn -> Signup form (4 fields: email/username/password/confirm) -> Pricing (3 plans: ضيف/مجاني/مميز + monthly $9.99 + annual $79.99) -> Admin /admin -> password hujjah2024 -> /admin/dashboard with 3 tabs (الأسئلة/المستخدمون/الإحصاءات). Stripe checkout is MOCKED (sk_test_emergent returns 503). Backend: 16 tests all passing.
mocked_apis: Stripe /api/subscription/checkout returns 503 'خدمة الدفع غير مفعّلة' because STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent
